skills.name: awesome-openclaw-skills
skills.desc: The awesome collection of OpenClaw skills. 5,400+ skills filtered and categorized from the official OpenClaw Skills Registry.
skills.install: git clone https://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-openclaw-skills.git # browse the awesome list

skills.name: awesome-openclaw-skills-zh
skills.desc: OpenClaw Chinese official skills library, translated from Clawdbot official skills, categorized by scenario, supports Chinese natural language invocation.
skills.install: git clone https://github.com/clawdbot-ai/awesome-openclaw-skills-zh.git # browse the awesome list
